cpu.description: GCP n2d-standard-4 (4 vCPU, 16 GB). NVIDIA-hosted RAG — no local GPU required.

env: Linux host with Docker + Docker Compose plugin. CPU-only runner — no NVIDIA GPU present. NVIDIA-hosted deployment: all model inference via https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1. Required env var: NGC_API_KEY. cwd: ${RAG_REPO_ROOT}/. Use deploy/compose/nvdev.env for cloud endpoints. IMPORTANT: use ci/vectordb-cpu.yaml instead of deploy/compose/vectordb.yaml for the vector database (the default uses a GPU Milvus image that fails on CPU runners).

expects.query: Use the rag-deploy-blueprint skill to deploy NVIDIA RAG Blueprint via Docker Compose in NVIDIA-hosted mode (cloud NIMs). Source deploy/compose/nvdev.env, then start the vector DB, ingestor server, and rag server so all containers reach the Up state. Do not start any local NIM containers — all model inference must use the cloud endpoint. The eval runs from inside the repository checkout; use git rev-parse --show-toplevel if you need the absolute path.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-deploy-blueprint SKILL.md before any deployment commands
The agent's trajectory shows it sourced deploy/compose/nvdev.env or used --env-file nvdev.env before running docker compose up

The agent's trajectory shows it ran docker compose up against ci/vectordb-cpu.yaml (or vectordb.yaml), docker-compose-ingestor-server.yaml, and docker-compose-rag-server.yaml — and did NOT run docker compose up against nims.yaml
`docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -E '^(rag-server|ingestor-server|milvus-standalone|milvus-etcd|milvus-minio)$' | wc -l` outputs a number greater than or equal to 5
`docker ps --format '{{.Names}}'` does NOT include any container whose name starts with 'nim-llm', 'nemoretriever-embedding-ms', or 'nemoretriever-ranking-ms'

expects.query: Get the RAG Blueprint running on this machine using Docker and cloud-hosted models. I have an NVIDIA API key set in my environment.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-deploy-blueprint SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it identified Docker as the deployment mode and NVIDIA-hosted (cloud NIMs, no local inference) as the NIM mode
`docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -E '^(rag-server|ingestor-server)$' | wc -l` outputs a number greater than or equal to 2
`docker ps --format '{{.Names}}'` does NOT include any container whose name starts with 'nim-llm'
